title: ficus eximia var. glabra
intro: Ficus eximia var. glabra, also known as the smooth Indian laurel, is a species of fig tree native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The smooth Indian laurel is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Ficus eximia var. glabra is typically used to make teas, infusions, and powders, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
